notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. Phase diagnosis names current phase + traces back to planning question with three independent quoted pieces of evidence. Transition explicitly named with the textbook signature ('the canonical sign'). Artifact-vs-understanding distinction is the through-line ('producing them better does not solve the problem'). Methodology fit fully separates waterfall logic from agile cadence as the actual recovery lever, not just a passing mention. Concrete intervention names six participants, three deliverables, time-box, definition of ready, escalation trigger, and proposes a four-cycle plan. Top of the rubric. This is what we want every learner reading.
